description: Add workflow_dispatch trigger to deploy-frontend.yml so the workflow can be manually triggered from the GitHub UI after environment variables are configured.
steps: Add workflow_dispatch to the on: trigger in .github/workflows/deploy-frontend.yml
acceptance_criteria: deploy-frontend.yml includes workflow_dispatch trigger alongside existing push trigger
YAML is valid and workflow structure is preserved
findings: Added workflow_dispatch trigger. This is a documentation/config-only change so build/test verification was skipped. YAML validated structurally.
